name: Fire Grunt
dialogue: Do you know how hot Monster fire breath can get?

name: Ice Grunt
dialogue: You're gonna be frozen in your tracks.

name: Fighting Grunt
dialogue: This buff physique isn't just for show!

name: Ground Grunt
dialogue: You'll be defeated into the ground!

name: Psychic Grunt
dialogue: Are you scared of psychics that use unseen power?

name: Dark Grunt
dialogue: Wherever there is light, there is also shadow.

name: Steel Grunt
dialogue: You're no match for my iron will!
